reasoning: XLE +1.26% leading while XLF -0.43% and XLK +0.03% (flat) = defensive rotation despite +$1.49 overnight gap-up. Energy outperformance without tech/financial leadership is risk-off signal. SPY down 0.35% despite gap-up suggests institutional selling in major constituents. VIX rising +0.93% confirms cautious tone. Not a strong bearish setup, but sector internals favor lower by cash open.
key_observations: XLE +1.26% (energy) — defensive outperformance, not bullish signal
XLF -0.43% (financials) — weakness in major SPY weight; yield curve concern
XLK +0.03% (tech) — flat refusal to lead despite gap-up is underperformance vs SPY expectations
